topStories.description: The hacktivist group claimed the attack was in retaliation for a U.S. strike on a Tehran school that killed more than 175 people, most of them children.

topStories.title: Trump attacks Thomas Massie as ‘worst Republican Congressman’, endorses Gallrein in Kentucky primary
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticised Thomas Massie and endorsed his primary challenger as tensions grow within the Republican Party ahead of the midterm elections. Massie has opposed several Trump policies, including strikes on Iran and efforts to curb presidential war powers.

dailyNews.title: Iran drone attack on US Base in Kuwait left dozens injured with brain trauma and burns: Report
dailyNews.description: A news report citing sources said that the March 1 strike targeted a tactical operations centre at the Shuaiba port outside Kuwait City, leaving many military personnel seriously hurt.

dailyNews.title: Two killed as tornadoes sweep across US Midwest in latest extreme weather
dailyNews.description: 'Supercell' thunderstorms hit Illinois and Indiana, after eight people killed by tornadoes in US Midwest last week.

dailyNews.title: Iran Military Says Will Hit US, Israeli Economic Targets In Region
dailyNews.description: Iran's military vowed on Wednesday to launch strikes against US and Israeli economic targets in the region, including banks, after overnight attacks hit an Iranian bank.

dailyNews.title: Rob Gronkowski calls out Logan Paul for potential fight at upcoming flag football game: 'I'll whoop his a--'

dailyNews.title: CNN botches New York terrorist attack coverage, forced to issue multiple corrections
dailyNews.description: CNN has had a rough week covering the alleged ISIS-inspired terror attack in New York City, issuing a pair of embarrassing apologies after facing significant online backlash.

dailyNews.description: The NFL is reportedly exploring playing games on Thanksgiving Eve as early as this season, giving the league another game during Thanksgiving week.

dailyNews.title: Epstein accountant testifies he never saw 'any type of transaction' with Trump, Comer says
dailyNews.description: Epstein accountant Richard Kahn testified he saw no payments to Donald Trump, as House Oversight Chair James Comer reveals five major figures who funded Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
dailyNews.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: Thune Is in a Vise as Trump and the Far Right Demand a Fight on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The majority leader is getting pounded for not pushing hard enough, but he says the votes just aren’t there to circumvent the filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need to Pivot on Immigration Before Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Asks Supreme Court to End Protections for Haitian Immigrants
dailyNews.description: The administration has also sought to end deportation protections for other immigrant groups, including Syrians.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.
